query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "omniretrieval: unified retrieval across heterogeneous knowledge source" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of cross-lingual retrieval (queries and documents in different language spaces) and provides empirical evidence on a specific linguistic domain (Arabic-English), which is directly relevant to extending a unified retrieval framework to heterogeneous linguistic sources.
